zh.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Berkeley於1386年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，她的父親Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley33歲，母親Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle25歲。她於大約1398年9月與Richard Beauchamp在英國結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1422年12月28日在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾金斯武德 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Berkeley于1386年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，她的父亲Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley33岁，母亲Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle25岁。她于大约1398年9月与Richard Beauchamp在英国结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1422年12月28日在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾金斯武德 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Berkeley was born in 1386, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley, was 33 and her mother, Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle, was 25. She married Richard Beauchamp about September 1398, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 28 December 1422, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Kingswood Abbey, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Richard Beauchamp environ septembre 1398, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 décembre 1422, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Kingswood Abbey, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Berkeleyが1386年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeleyは33歳，母Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisleは25歳であった。約1398年9月にイギリスでRichard Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1422年12月28日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアキングスウッド アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Warwick Castle, Warwickshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Berkeley(이)가 1386년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1398년 9월 영국에서 Richard Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1422년 12월 28일 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 킨그스우드 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Berkeley nasceu em 1386, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Beauchamp aproximadamente setembro de 1398, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de dezembro de 1422, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Kingswood Abbey, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Warwick Castle, Warwickshire, England: варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Berkeley родилась в 1386 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Beauchamp около сентябрь 1398 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 28 декабря 1422 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности кингсвуд эбби, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Richard Beauchamp aproximadamente septiembre de 1398, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de diciembre de 1422, en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Kingswood Abbey, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
